creator: p5B2EA84B3@t-online.de
text:
Created attachment 233094
Poudriere build log file

Building with Poudriere on stable/13-n250285-c43786cc376
building rust failes with 

===>  Configuring for rust-1.59.0
===>   FreeBSD 10 autotools fix applied to /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/rust/work/rustc-1.59.0-src/vendor/libssh2-sys/libssh2/config.rpath
Bad system call
=> Sanity check failed: kernel is missing COMPAT_FREEBSD11
=> Aborting build
*** Error code 1

COMPAT_FREEBSD11 !! Come on folks this is soooo far behind.

At least here COMPAT is deactivated for security reasons.
